notes:
STAGE 1 BIOLOGY RECIPE ENGINE complete per substrate spec.

=== Files created (7 modules + 1 data file) ===
- src/renderer/game/data/recipes.js (NEW — file did not previously exist; contains only the 3 biology recipes; existing crafting recipes still live in systems/craftingSystem.js RECIPES which was NOT touched. Per substrate §15.3 default, biology recipes live in data/recipes.js with category: 'biology'. The 'additive only' rule is satisfied vacuously: there are no pre-existing entries in this file.)
- src/renderer/game/systems/biology/Recipe.js
- src/renderer/game/systems/biology/Organism.js (Stage 1 shape; Stage 2/3 extensions documented in JSDoc only)
- src/renderer/game/systems/biology/recipeRegistry.js
- src/renderer/game/systems/biology/Stage1RecipeEngine.js
- src/renderer/game/systems/biology/biologyEvents.js

- src/renderer/game/systems/biology/index.js

=== Stage 1 public API per substrate §4 ===
- registerRecipe(recipeConfig) → Recipe
- attemptRecipe(scene, recipeId, providedInputs, options?) → AttemptResult
- emitRecipeOutcome(recipeId, success, output, failureReason?) → RecipeOutcomePayload
- getStageVisibility(playerState) → ['stage1'] | ['stage1','stage2'] | ['stage1','stage2','stage3']

=== Stage 2 stubs (halt-and-surface) ===
- designOrganism(baseSpeciesId, parameterChoices) → throws
- validateOrganism(organism, environmentalConstraints) → throws
- emitOrganismDesignEvent(organism) → throws
- upgradeOrganismToNextStage(organism) → throws (cross-stage; needs Stage 2)
Message shape: '[biology] X is deferred to Phase 5 (Stage 2 implementation). See biology-substrate.md §15.1.'

=== Stage 3 stubs (halt-and-surface) ===
- createEcosystem(biomeConfig) → throws
- introduceOrganism(ecosystem, organism) → throws
- stepSimulation(ecosystem, deltaTime) → throws
- observeEcosystemState(ecosystem) → throws
- emitSimulationEvent(eventType, ecosystem, organism, details) → throws
Message shape: '[biology] X is deferred to Phase 6 (Stage 3 implementation). See biology-substrate.md §15.4.'

=== 3 registered recipes ===
1. healing_salve
   inputs: leaf_slot=creosote_leaves×1, fiber_slot=agave_fiber×1
   output: healing_salve
   outcomeObservationId: 'salve_crafted'
   knowledgeUnlock: 'plant_pharmacology_basics'
   process: 4000ms, stages [grinding, mixing, curing]
2. plant_composite
   inputs: fiber_slot=agave_fiber×1, resin_slot=creosote_leaves×1
   output: plant_composite
   outcomeObservationId: 'composite_created' (matches quests.js perfect_composite.combine_materials)
   knowledgeUnlock: 'composite_materials'
   process: 5000ms, stages [fiber_alignment, resin_infusion, press_cure]
3. protective_coating
   inputs: resin_slot=creosote_leaves×1, wax_slot=jojoba_seeds×1
   output: protective_coating
   outcomeObservationId: 'coating_applied' (coexists with ZuzuGarageScene's prior emitter — recipe engine adds the canonical biology-system path)
   knowledgeUnlock: 'desert_surface_treatment'
   process: 3500ms, stages [rendering, blending, application]

- §15.2 Engineered-organism consequence model: DEFERRED (blocks Stage 3)
- §15.3 Recipe authoring format: RESOLVED via default — recipes live in data/recipes.js with category: 'biology'. No biology-specific recipe editor in this dispatch.
- §15.4 Stage 3 tick rate: DEFERRED (blocks Stage 3)
- §15.5 Stage 2 parameter dimensions: DEFERRED
- §15.6 Parametric trial save/replay: DEFERRED
- §15.7 Workbench portability mechanism: DEFERRED (does not block Stage 1)
- §15.8 Cross-cutting (knowledge state, navigation, asset pipeline): unchanged

- NO scene file modified (verified: only files under systems/biology/ + data/recipes.js touched).

=== Ecology bridge ===
Biology subscribes to 'ecology.observation' via onEcologyObservation(scene, listener) (a thin Phaser scene-events wrapper). Does NOT import EcologyEntity directly. Does NOT import any module under systems/ecology/. For Stage 1 the recipe engine functions without strict ecology dependency — the hook is in place for Stage 2 / 3.

=== Build status ===
`npm run build` PASSES (vite 5.4.21, 886 modules transformed, built in ~12s).

=== Verdict tag ===
[design-only-implementation] — upgrades to runtime-validated when a scene mounts the workbench and a recipe flow tests end-to-end.
